requirement_topic.en: Georgia Grid Connection — 220/380 V / 50 Hz, GNERC Licensing, and Distribution-Operator Coordination
requirement_topic.zh: 格鲁吉亚并网接入——220/380 V / 50 Hz、GNERC许可及配电运营商协调
requirement_topic.zht: 喬治亞併網接入——220/380 V / 50 Hz、GNERC許可及配電運營商協調

summary.en: Georgia operates on 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz, aligned with the European IEC baseline. The Georgian National Energy and Water Supply Regulatory Commission (GNERC) is the national energy regulator responsible for licensing electricity market participants, approving connection conditions, and setting grid codes. High-voltage transmission is operated by Georgian State Electrosystem (GSE); distribution is handled by Telasi (Tbilisi region, Energo-Pro group) and Energo-Pro Georgia (most other regions). EV charger installations that connect to the distribution network require coordination with the relevant distribution-network operator (DNO) for connection capacity, metering, load management, and technical conditions. Harmonic injection and power-quality limits follow IEC 61000 series requirements consistent with GEOSTM-adopted standards. Georgia's EU DCFTA alignment directs technical standards toward IEC/EN frameworks.
summary.zh: 格鲁吉亚采用220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz，与欧洲IEC基线一致。格鲁吉亚国家能源与供水监管委员会（GNERC）是国家能源监管机构，负责许可电力市场参与者、审批接入条件和制定电网规程。高压输电由格鲁吉亚国家电力系统（GSE）运营；配电由Telasi（第比利斯地区，Energo-Pro集团）和Energo-Pro Georgia（大部分其他地区）负责。接入配电网的充电桩安装须与相关配电网运营商（DNO）协调接入容量、计量、负载管理和技术条件。谐波注入和电能质量限值遵循与GEOSTM采用标准一致的IEC 61000系列要求。格鲁吉亚《欧盟深度及全面自由贸易区协定》对接方向使技术标准面向IEC/EN框架。
summary.zht: 喬治亞採用220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz，與歐洲IEC基線一致。喬治亞國家能源與供水監管委員會（GNERC）是國家能源監管機構，負責許可電力市場參與者、審批接入條件和制定電網規程。高壓輸電由喬治亞國家電力系統（GSE）運營；配電由Telasi（第比利斯地區，Energo-Pro集團）和Energo-Pro Georgia（大部分其他地區）負責。接入配電網的充電樁安裝須與相關配電網運營商（DNO）協調接入容量、計量、負載管理和技術條件。諧波注入和電能質量限值遵循與GEOSTM採用標準一致的IEC 61000系列要求。喬治亞《歐盟深度及全面自由貿易區協定》對接方向使技術標準面向IEC/EN框架。

standards_or_laws: GNERC — Georgian National Energy and Water Supply Regulatory Commission (gnerc.org)
GSE — Georgian State Electrosystem, transmission grid operator (gse.com.ge)
Telasi distribution-network connection technical conditions (Tbilisi region)
Energo-Pro Georgia distribution-network connection technical conditions (other regions)
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
Georgia Law on Electricity and Natural Gas (as amended)

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are accepted under GB/T 18487.1-2023 design evidence, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 communication for DC systems, and local grid-operator project acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz — the same nominal voltage as Georgia. However, China's domestic standards (GB/T) are not IEC/EN standards and are not recognised under Georgia's GEOSTM framework. The distribution-network access approval route in Georgia is through GNERC-licensed DNOs (Telasi or Energo-Pro Georgia), not China's State Grid or local grid-operator equivalent.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装依据GB/T 18487.1-2023设计证据、GB/T 20234接口、直流系统GB/T 27930-2023通信，以及当地电网运营商项目验收。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz——与格鲁吉亚标称电压相同。但中国国内标准（GB/T）不是IEC/EN标准，在格鲁吉亚GEOSTM框架下不被认可。格鲁吉亚的配电网接入审批路径通过GNERC许可的配电网运营商（Telasi或Energo-Pro Georgia），而非中国国家电网或当地电网运营商对等机构。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝依據GB/T 18487.1-2023設計證據、GB/T 20234接口、直流系統GB/T 27930-2023通訊，以及當地電網運營商項目驗收。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz——與喬治亞標稱電壓相同。但中國國內標準（GB/T）不是IEC/EN標準，在喬治亞GEOSTM框架下不被認可。喬治亞的配電網接入審批路徑通過GNERC許可的配電網運營商（Telasi或Energo-Pro Georgia），而非中國國家電網或當地電網運營商對等機構。

standards_or_laws: China State Grid or local grid-operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) the charger's input-voltage range covers 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz with adequate tolerance; (2) power electronics and thermal design are appropriate for Georgia's temperate-to-hot climate range; (3) the installation is approved by the relevant DNO (Telasi for Tbilisi; Energo-Pro Georgia elsewhere) under GNERC-licensed conditions; (4) harmonic injection and power-quality evidence meets IEC 61000 series limits consistent with GEOSTM-adopted standards; (5) metering and load-management provisions satisfy DNO technical conditions. GB/T design documentation alone is not accepted as compliance evidence under GEOSTM or DNO technical conditions.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩输入电压范围覆盖220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz并有足够容差；(2) 电力电子和热设计适配格鲁吉亚温带至热带气候范围；(3) 安装已获得相关配电网运营商（第比利斯为Telasi，其他地区为Energo-Pro Georgia）在GNERC许可条件下的审批；(4) 谐波注入和电能质量证据符合与GEOSTM采用标准一致的IEC 61000系列限值；(5) 计量和负载管理条款满足配电网运营商技术条件。单独的GB/T设计文件在GEOSTM或配电网运营商技术条件下不被视为合规证据。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁輸入電壓範圍覆蓋220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz並有足夠容差；(2) 電力電子和熱設計適配喬治亞溫帶至熱帶氣候範圍；(3) 安裝已獲得相關配電網運營商（第比利斯為Telasi，其他地區為Energo-Pro Georgia）在GNERC許可條件下的審批；(4) 諧波注入和電能質量證據符合與GEOSTM採用標準一致的IEC 61000系列限值；(5) 計量和負載管理條款滿足配電網運營商技術條件。單獨的GB/T設計文件在GEOSTM或配電網運營商技術條件下不被視為合規證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — GNERC licensing and DNO connection approval are required for grid-connected EV charger installations in Georgia; IEC 61000 power-quality compliance consistent with GEOSTM-adopted standards is expected
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid-operator acceptance applies domestically and is not a GNERC or Georgian DNO approval substitute; GB/T documentation must be supplemented with IEC/EN evidence for Georgia

source.publisher: Georgian National Energy and Water Supply Regulatory Commission (GNERC)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Georgia-ready charger installation needs IEC/EN-based product evidence, DNO connection approval from Telasi or Energo-Pro Georgia, and GNERC-consistent grid documentation. China domestic 220/380 V design documentation without IEC evidence is not sufficient for Georgia grid connection.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向格鲁吉亚的充电桩安装需要基于IEC/EN的产品证据、Telasi或Energo-Pro Georgia的配电网接入审批，以及符合GNERC要求的电网文件。未附IEC证据的中国国内220/380 V设计文件不足以满足格鲁吉亚并网要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向喬治亞的充電樁安裝需要基於IEC/EN的產品證據、Telasi或Energo-Pro Georgia的配電網接入審批，以及符合GNERC要求的電網文件。未附IEC證據的中國國內220/380 V設計文件不足以滿足喬治亞併網要求。
